props.name: scrollContainerRef
props.description: Optional ref for a custom scroll container to track scroll position.

props.name: texts
props.description: Array of strings to display as scrolling text.

props.name: velocity
props.description: Base velocity for scrolling; sign is flipped for odd indexed texts.

props.name: className
props.description: CSS class applied to each text copy (span).

props.name: damping
props.description: Damping value for the spring animation.

props.name: stiffness
props.description: Stiffness value for the spring animation.

props.name: numCopies
props.description: Number of copies of the text rendered for a continuous scrolling effect.

props.name: velocityMapping
props.description: Mapping from scroll velocity to a movement multiplier for dynamic scrolling.

props.name: parallaxClassName
props.description: CSS class for the parallax container.

props.name: scrollerClassName
props.description: CSS class for the scroller container.

props.name: parallaxStyle
props.description: Inline styles for the parallax container.

props.name: scrollerStyle
props.description: Inline styles for the scroller container.
